_comment: Session calendar for Texas Sports Academy. Read by the Next.js dashboard (web/src/lib/sessions.ts) for the window selector and stale-banner logic. The Python side does NOT read this file. Keys: id (sortable), name (display), startDate/endDate (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive). When a new school year is approaching, append entries here. The dashboard shows a stale-banner to the head coach if no session covers today AND no future sessions exist.
